scope.target: corrected executable goal plan in review prompt

findings.summary: Plan lacks explicit RED coverage for missing or unreadable project-bootstrap-agent-setup-report.json, so preflight could still pass without the required auth-readiness input.
Token-bearing clone URL rejection should explicitly cover the existing-repo path and report redaction, not only the no-clone case.

checks_reviewed.command: git status --short && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git rev-parse HEAD
checks_reviewed.evidence: Read-only inspection confirmed target branch fix/project-bootstrap-node-repl-login-proof at b9c84e139c77ada761c218511612edafeee89a24 with existing dirty/untracked evidence files.

checks_reviewed.command: rg --files for AGENTS, PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT, bootstrap scripts, docs, validators, and evals
checks_reviewed.evidence: Located plan-relevant project-bootstrap, pod-role-bootstrap, documentation, validator, and smoke-test surfaces.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: corrected RED test list against repo TDD and project-bootstrap report contract
checks_reviewed.evidence: RED list covers present fake auth reports but not missing/unreadable agent setup report despite source contract requiring project-bootstrap-agent-setup-report.json.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: preflight authority and auth blocker wiring plan
checks_reviewed.evidence: Plan moves auth pass/fail to project-bootstrap-preflight.sh and requires stable blockers for railway, gcloud, gcloud ADC, and Expo MCP.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: Expo MCP versus Expo CLI separation
checks_reviewed.evidence: Plan separates expo-mcp-auth-missing from expo-cli-auth-missing and aligns with docs/CODEX_MCP_ENVIRONMENT.md:304 and PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md:302.
Plan replaces current Railway auto-install behavior with PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP_INSTALL_APPROVED=true and exact install reporting.

checks_reviewed.command: bash -n changed shell scripts and eval smoke
checks_reviewed.evidence: Plan-mode read-only review; no implementation diff was provided to syntax-check. Plan includes this as a future verification gate.
Plan-mode read-only review; no changed validator diff was provided. Plan includes this as a future verification gate.

checks_reviewed.command: pnpm run test:runtime / pnpm run test:local-harness / pnpm turbo run lint test
checks_reviewed.evidence: Plan-mode review only. These are required final gates after implementation, and the plan lists them.
Plan-mode review only. AGENTS.md requires them for mobile environment/runtime changes; the plan lists them unless final reviewer accepts source-backed not applicable rationale.

residual_risks: Atlassian remote auth remains outside the corrected provider-auth blocker set; acceptable for this scoped plan unless selected workflow requires Atlassian login.
Live provider auth readiness cannot be proven by local validators and must remain a human/provider-session gate.
OpenClaw /workspace proof remains outside repo-local validator authority and must not be claimed from local tests.
